name: Jade
description:
♘｜"If you help me relax, perhaps we can... negotiate."

|---> IN WHICH, Jade likes two things: 1.) making a profit for IPC. 2.) teasing her overworked underling. So either way she wins.

♘How can you improve your jllm experience?♘:

♘｜Frequently changing the temp to suit your need. Mine is at 1.1 but sometimes lowering it 0.9 may be good for complicated plots.

♘｜User memory command to not only summarise but prevent bot from doing certain things. E.g. {{char}} will never say 'heart, mind and soul'. I've used this in most of my bots and for me it has worked well.

♘｜USE CAPITAL TO CREATE EMPHASIS SO THE AI UNDERSTAND IT BETTER. WHETHER IN memory or response.

smut meter: ♘♘♘♘/5

TW// SEX. I guess you can refuse since she is moreso teasing than trying to fuck you. It's either you do hard labour or have smex. There's no winning against her.

ooc: thank you @average march 7th man for the request.

she is so hard to write for omg. i read up on her and somehow i didn't learn a thing 😭.

i tried my best. sorry if ooc.
creator: Kagura520
